name: FilterChip
description: Chip-family filter control with a visibility label part, value summary, optional chevron action, and optional dropdown/editor panel.

props.name: labelIcon
props.description: Leading icon for the label part; defaults to Eye or EyeOff based on visibility.

props.name: isVisible
props.description: Whether the filter is applied to the table.

props.name: onVisibilityChange
props.description: Called when the label part is clicked.

props.name: valueSummary
props.description: Summary content rendered in the value part.

props.name: children
props.description: Dropdown panel content rendered when the value chevron is clicked.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when dropdown open state changes.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional class name for the root filter chip.

states.rationale: Label and value action buttons layer hover/pressed overlay tokens over the outline chip bar. Focus uses the shared focus-ring token, and hidden/disabled states swap to chip disabled foreground plus disabled semantic surface and border tokens.

accessibility.semanticElement: div wrapper with native button controls
requiredAria: aria-expanded on value action when editor exists
aria-haspopup on value action when editor exists

keyboard.Space: Activate focused label or value action button
keyboard.Enter: Activate focused label or value action button
keyboard.Tab: Move focus through label and value action buttons in natural order

propertyMapping.note: Figma names the property hidden; React exposes the positive state as isVisible.
The default label icon follows visibility state unless labelIcon is provided.
This Figma set represents the filter chip family.

useWhen: A table or data-view filter must stay visible as a chip
Clicking the label part toggles whether the filter affects the view
Clicking the value chevron opens a filter editor
A filter value summary must remain visible in a toolbar or filter row
Sorting or filter chips need a label part that reflects state
doNotUseFor: Passive status or metadata - use Badge or a text label
Removable tags or editable row values - use ChipRegular
Standalone chip content/action parts - use Chip only inside chip-family components
Primary or secondary actions - use Button

knownDeviations.description: Figma exposes only hidden and size for the filter set. React exposes label, valueSummary, children, open state, and callbacks required for real product filter behavior.
